title: Unique index without duplicate check — build fails after long scan
expected_feedback: Standard: Creating a unique index on 15M documents without first checking for duplicates. If ANY duplicates exist, the entire index build fails after scanning all documents — wasting potentially minutes of work. On 4.2+, the optimized build may have already consumed significant I/O before discovering the conflict. Pre-check duplicates: db.users.aggregate([{$group:{_id:'$email',count:{$sum:1}}},{$match:{count:{$gt:1}}}]). Fix duplicates first, then create the index.
violated_rule: Unique index preceded by duplicate check
